## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Start `kafka_producer.py`...
2. Run `pathway_pipeline.py`...
3. Open the dashboard...
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 📋 Environment

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python | e.g. 3.11.4 |
| pathway | e.g. 0.14.2 |
| Docker | e.g. 4.28.0 |
| Kafka running? | Yes / No |
